description: This Java class implements a Spring Security filter (JwtAuthFilter) that intercepts HTTP requests to extract and validate Bearer JWT tokens, and then sets the authentication context accordingly.

classes.name: JwtAuthFilter
classes.description: A Spring Security filter that processes JWT tokens from the Authorization header to authenticate requests.

methods.name: doFilterInternal
methods.description: Overrides the method to process each HTTP request, extracting JWT, validating it, and setting the security context.
